tasks.title: Implement run --format ndjson/json
tasks.description: Replace placeholder output in cmd/run.rs:228-255 with actual LLM integration. Load model from Config (not hardcoded 'gpt-4o'), initialize LLM provider from config, send prompt with streaming, write events via NdjsonSerializer, handle tool calls and results.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Config model loading returns correct model
AddUnitTest: verify NdjsonSerializer outputs valid NDJSON lines
AddIntegrationTest: verify LLM provider receives correct prompt and returns streaming events
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing run command tests still pass after refactor
tasks.impl_notes: Use Config::get('agent.model') with fallback to 'gpt-4o'. Wire up LLM provider from config. Stream events as they're received.

tasks.title: Implement config set
tasks.description: Fix cmd/config.rs:199-202 which always errors. Parse dot-notation key (e.g., 'agent.model'), validate value type matches expected type, persist to config file, reload config to apply changes.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify dot-notation key parsing works for nested keys
AddUnitTest: verify type validation rejects mismatched types
AddIntegrationTest: verify config file is written and persisted correctly
AddRegressionTest: ensure 'config get' still works after 'config set'
tasks.impl_notes: Parse key path using split('.'). Validate value type before writing. Use Config system for persistence.

tasks.title: Implement agent run
tasks.description: Fix cmd/agent.rs:48 which only prints debug. Query AgentRegistry for requested agent type, initialize LLM provider from Config, execute agent with provided prompt, stream output via NdjsonSerializer if --format set.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify AgentRegistry lookup returns correct agent
AddUnitTest: verify NdjsonSerializer format flag works correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify agent execution produces correct output
AddRegressionTest: ensure agent list still works after run implementation
tasks.impl_notes: Query AgentRegistry by type string. Initialize LLM from Config. Stream output based on --format flag.

tasks.title: Implement agent list
tasks.description: Fix cmd/agent.rs:48 which is not implemented. Query AgentRegistry for all registered agents, display name/description/capabilities, support --verbose flag for detailed info.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify AgentRegistry returns all registered agents
AddUnitTest: verify verbose flag shows additional details
AddIntegrationTest: verify output format is readable
AddRegressionTest: ensure agent run still works after list implementation
tasks.impl_notes: Use AgentRegistry::list_agents() or similar. Format output with name, description, capabilities columns.

tasks.title: Implement account login/logout/status
tasks.description: Fix cmd/account.rs which returns 'not_implemented'. Integrate with opencode-auth crate, implement browser-based OAuth flow, store credentials securely, display authentication status.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify auth crate integration for login flow
AddUnitTest: verify credentials are stored securely
AddIntegrationTest: verify OAuth browser flow completes
AddRegressionTest: ensure account status shows correct state
tasks.impl_notes: Use opencode-auth crate. Implement browser-based OAuth. Store tokens securely (keyring/credential store).

tasks.title: Implement attach command
tasks.description: Fix cmd/attach.rs:83-90 which only prints URL/id. Connect via ACP protocol to remote session, handle local session attachment, manage session state transfer.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ACP protocol connection establishment
AddUnitTest: verify session state transfer correctness
AddIntegrationTest: verify attach command connects to remote session
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing attach functionality not broken
tasks.impl_notes: Use ACP protocol for connection. Handle session state serialization and transfer.

tasks.title: Implement mcp add
tasks.description: Add 'Add' variant to McpAction enum in cmd/mcp.rs. Validate MCP server command exists, persist MCP server configuration, initialize MCP client connection.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify McpAction::Add variant exists and parses correctly
AddUnitTest: verify MCP server command validation
AddIntegrationTest: verify MCP client connection initialization
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing mcp commands still work
tasks.impl_notes: Add variant to McpAction enum. Validate command exists using which crate. Persist to config.

tasks.title: Implement session review/diff
tasks.description: Fix cmd/session.rs:991-1011 which are stubs. Load session messages and context, implement file diff using session state changes, show review of modified files, format output for terminal.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify session message loading
AddUnitTest: verify file diff computation
AddIntegrationTest: verify review output is formatted correctly
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing session commands still work
tasks.impl_notes: Load session from storage. Compute diff between session states. Format for terminal display.

tasks.title: Implement session fork TUI integration
tasks.description: Fix cmd/session.rs:673-698 which prints JSON only. Create fork via SessionSharing, transfer session context properly, integrate with TUI for session management.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify SessionSharing fork creation - PASS (test_session_sharing_fork_session)
AddUnitTest: verify session context transfer - PASS (test_session_sharing_fork_inheritance)
AddIntegrationTest: verify TUI integration for fork operation - PASS (ForkDialog, execute_fork)
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing session fork still works - PASS (test_session_fork)
test_commands: cargo test -p opencode-cli --test e2e_session_workflows - PASS (7 tests)
tasks.impl_notes: Use SessionSharing for fork creation. Transfer context properly. Wire up TUI components. CLI fork at cmd/session.rs:858 using SessionSharing.fork_session(). TUI fork at app.rs:2611 execute_fork() with ForkDialog mode.

tasks.title: Implement github install persistence
tasks.description: Fix cmd/github.rs:189-211 which doesn't save workflow. Write workflow to .opencode/ directory, persist to workspace config, verify installation on subsequent runs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify workflow file is written to .opencode/
AddUnitTest: verify workspace config persistence
AddIntegrationTest: verify installation persists across runs
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing github commands still work
tasks.impl_notes: Write workflow to .opencode/workflows/. Persist to workspace config. Check for existing installation.

tasks.title: Extend providers login multi-provider
tasks.description: Extend cmd/providers.rs:142-145 which only supports OpenAI. Add Anthropic, Google AI Studio, Azure OpenAI, and custom provider support.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Anthropic provider authentication
AddUnitTest: verify Google AI Studio provider authentication
AddUnitTest: verify Azure OpenAI provider authentication
AddIntegrationTest: verify multi-provider login flow
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing OpenAI login still works
tasks.impl_notes: Extend browser auth flow for each provider type. Use provider-specific OAuth endpoints.

tasks.title: Implement acp handshake session storage
tasks.description: Fix cmd/acp.rs:250-292 where session is not stored. Store ACP session after successful handshake, implement session recovery on reconnect, handle session expiration.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify session storage after handshake - PASS (test_store_and_retrieve_session)
AddUnitTest: verify session recovery on reconnect - PASS (session recovery logic in run_acp)
AddUnitTest: verify session expiration handling - PASS (test_acp_session_is_expired, test_acp_session_not_expired, test_session_expiration_check)
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing ACP commands still work - PASS (15 ACP unit tests)
tasks.impl_notes: Store session in Config/Storage system. Added AcpSession struct to config crate with session_id, server_id, server_url, client_id, version, capabilities, created_at, expires_at. Implemented recovery mechanism that checks for existing non-expired session before creating new one. Session expires after 1 hour by default.

tasks.title: Fix config migrate
tasks.description: Fix cmd/config.rs:204-208 which is stub that errors. Implement TOML to JSONC migration OR remove flag with deprecation notice.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify TOML to JSONC migration works
AddUnitTest: verify deprecation warning is displayed
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify migration handles invalid TOML
AddRegressionTest: ensure config get/set still works
tasks.impl_notes: Implement migration using toml crate for parsing, serialize as JSONC. Or emit deprecation warning and exit.

tasks.title: Parse environment variables
tasks.description: Fix main.rs where env vars are not parsed before App init. Parse OPENCODE_AUTO_SHARE, OPENCODE_CONFIG, OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR, OPENCODE_DISABLE_AUTOUPDATE, OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA, OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD before Config loading.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify each env var is parsed correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify env vars are applied at startup
AddRegressionTest: ensure app starts without env vars set
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify invalid env var values are handled
tasks.impl_notes: Parse env vars before Config loading. Apply in order of precedence. Validate values.

tasks.title: Move model visibility to Config
tasks.description: Fix cmd/models.rs:238-267 which uses flat JSON file. Update Config schema for model visibility, migrate existing visibility settings, deprecate flat JSON file.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Config schema has model visibility
AddUnitTest: verify migration from flat JSON works
AddIntegrationTest: verify visibility changes persist in Config
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing model commands still work
tasks.impl_notes: Update Config schema. Migrate data from flat JSON. Update models.rs to use Config.

tasks.title: Load default model from Config
tasks.description: Fix cmd/run.rs:226 which has hardcoded 'gpt-4o'. Replace with Config lookup using config.get('agent.model') with fallback.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Config lookup for agent.model
AddUnitTest: verify fallback to 'gpt-4o' when not set
AddIntegrationTest: verify run command uses Config model
AddRegressionTest: ensure run command works without Config
tasks.impl_notes: Use Config::get('agent.model'). Fallback to 'gpt-4o' if not set. This is a prerequisite for FR-005.

tasks.title: Implement auth login
tasks.description: Support multiple providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) for auth login. Implement browser-based OAuth flow, secure credential storage, display login status.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify multi-provider support in auth
AddUnitTest: verify OAuth flow for each provider
AddIntegrationTest: verify credential storage and retrieval
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing auth still works
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented via account command with multi-provider support (github, openai, anthropic). Browser-based OAuth via opencode-auth crate. Credentials stored securely. Added 'auth' alias so both 'opencode auth login' and 'opencode account login' work.

tasks.title: Implement agent create
tasks.description: Create agent configuration, register with AgentRegistry, persist to config.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify agent configuration creation
AddUnitTest: verify AgentRegistry registration
AddIntegrationTest: verify config persistence of new agent
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing agents still work
tasks.impl_notes: Create config struct for agent. Register with AgentRegistry. Persist to config file.

tasks.title: Fix provider browser unwrap
tasks.description: Replace unwrap() in cmd/providers.rs:67-88 with proper error propagation.
test_criteria: AddErrorHandlingTest: verify provider initialization handles errors
AddRegressionTest: ensure providers still work after fix
RunTestSuite: run cargo clippy to verify no unwrap warnings
tasks.impl_notes: Replace unwrap() with ? operator or proper error handling. Return meaningful errors.

tasks.title: Consolidate load_config()
tasks.description: Create shared helper for config loading across multiple cmd files.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify shared helper function works
AddRegressionTest: ensure all commands work after refactor
RunTestSuite: run all command tests to verify no breakage
tasks.impl_notes: Extract common config loading logic to shared function. Update all cmd files to use it.

tasks.title: Remove hardcoded cmd+k
tasks.description: Move keybinds from cmd/config.rs:217-218 to Config system.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify keybinds are read from Config
AddRegressionTest: ensure keybinds still work from Config
RunTestSuite: run config tests to verify
tasks.impl_notes: Add keybinds to Config schema. Read from Config instead of hardcoded values.

tasks.title: Make GitHub API URL configurable
tasks.description: Read GitHub API URL from Config instead of hardcoding in cmd/github.rs:5-8.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify GitHub API URL is read from Config
AddUnitTest: verify OPENCODE_GITHUB_API_URL env var works
AddRegressionTest: ensure GitHub commands still work
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify fallback to default URL
tasks.impl_notes: Add github.api_url to Config schema. Read from Config or env var. Fallback to default.
